steps.title: Isolate the 13x term
steps.content: Start with $$13x+50=180.$$ Subtract $50$ from both sides: $$13x=130.$$

steps.title: Match an equivalent equation
steps.content: Any equation with the same solution can be written as $13x=130$, which gives $x=10$.

steps.title: Why this is equivalent
steps.content: Subtracting the same number from both sides keeps the solution unchanged. The equation $13x=130$ is therefore the same problem with the constant term removed from the left side.
